title: compute_interchromosomal_effect_v1 — HEADLINE chain action
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='compute_interchromosomal_inversion_effect'. Multi-source chain: reads chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 + family_aware_permutation_design_v1 (required) + local_inv_controls_v1 (optional) envelopes, runs Welch's t on per-parent CO_per_mb (het vs non-het = homA+homB) for each tested chromosome, runs N family-aware permutations (shuffle karyotype labels within permutation_block), applies BH + Bonferroni across off-focal-chrom tests. Promoted from the browser-side `interchromosomal/_stats.js`.

target.description: Supply either the named *_layer_id fields or an ordered source_layer_ids array (order: events, controls, design). events_layer_id + design_layer_id are required; controls_layer_id is optional but drives focal-chrom detection + the local_inv_burden flag.

focal_inversion_id.description: Focal inversion id to test. Defaults to the first distinct id (sorted) in the design envelope when null.

include_co.description: Sum n_co into the per-parent rate.

include_dco.description: Also sum n_dco into the per-parent rate (combined CO+DCO mode).

seed.description: Mulberry32 seed for reproducible permutation p-values; omit for non-deterministic runs.

p_bh_alpha.description: Significance threshold applied to BH-adjusted p-values (drives sig_flag).
